title: Venice 2022 – Alleanza Verdi Sinistra
tags: elections verkiezingen elezionipolitiche poster bill italia venice venedig veneto venezia italië italy venetië elezionipolitiche2022
description: This isn't a poster for a sinister alliance, but for the Green-Left Alliance, sinistra being the Italian word for left. The Alliance got 3.6% of the vote and 12 seats of the 400-seat parliament.  The More Europe party of Emma Bonino got 2.8% of the vote and 2 seats in parliament.  The Democratic Party got 19.1% of the vote and 69 seats.  These parties are all part of the Centre-Left Coalition.
